name: cost-mode
description: Cost-conscious mode for Claude Code. Cuts filler, suggests cheaper models, encourages efficient patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Reduce Claude Code token usage by 40-70%.
interface.longDescription: Cost-conscious mode that enforces concise responses, suggests cheaper models for simple tasks, and encourages efficient workflow patterns. Three intensity levels: lite, standard, strict.
defaultPrompt: Enable cost-conscious mode. Reduce token usage while keeping technical accuracy.
